bottom_line: Code review steps (S02, S08) needed fix cycles because the reviewer knew to look for design-doc alignment and found gaps in test coverage and environment data — both correctable without code changes.
coverage_notes: No raw run logs available (worktree already cleaned up by reaper). Analyzed agent self-reports (S01–S08), fix-cycle prompt files (S02×2, S08×1), workflow manifest, and DB step status. DB telemetry: full (DB:UP, identity confirmed). S02 and S08 had fix cycles; no other step had retries.

findings.title: S02 fix cycles: design-doc not consulted before first code-review run
findings.recommendation: Add an explicit 'Read design doc BEFORE reviewing code' instruction to the CodeReview prompt template. The fix-cycle prompt for S02 correctly surfaced this rule (line 10: 'design doc wins when the two disagree'); the first-run prompt should have surfaced it proactively.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00039/fix-cycles/CR-00039_S02_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:10 — 'prior fix cycles on this codebase have failed because the agent trusted the failure-report's root-cause hypothesis and drifted away from the design doc's explicit fix spec'

ai-dev/active/CR-00039/fix-cycles/CR-00039_S02_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:16 — 'test file still asserted old CSS class names (iw-step-strip/iw-step-seg) per the design doc TDD section — first review missed this'
findings.pros: Eliminates a round-trip on every CR that changes CSS class names.
findings.if_we_dont: Every CR that renames CSS classes will fail code review once, then correct on the fix cycle — wasting ~5–10 min per occurrence.
findings.effort: S (~5 lines in the prompt template)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add 'Read design doc BEFORE reviewing code' instruction to the CodeReview prompt template; analyzed in CR-00039 (see ai-dev/active/CR-00039/reports/CR-00039_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/CR_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S08 fix cycle: browser verification cannot test fix-cycle amber pills — E2E seed has no fix_cycle_count > 0 items
findings.recommendation: Add an E2E seed fixture that creates an item with fix_cycle_count >= 1 so browser verification can exercise the ↺SXX amber pill branch. Alternatively, add a note to the BrowserVerification prompt to skip V3 when no fix-cycle items exist rather than returning n/a.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00039/reports/CR-00039_S08_QvBrowser_report.md:13 — 'The production pg_dump seed contains zero items with fix_cycle_count > 0. All 4 completed items show Fix Cycles = 0.'
ai-dev/active/CR-00039/reports/CR-00039_S08_BrowserVerification_Report.md:43 — 'The feature cannot be visually verified without an item that has fix_cycle_count > 0 in the database.'
findings.pros: Future browser verifications for fix-cycle features can fully verify the feature end-to-end.
findings.cons: Adds complexity to the seed fixture; one more thing to maintain.
findings.if_we_dont: Browser verification for fix-cycle features will always return n/a for V3, degrading signal quality.
findings.effort: M (~10 lines in seed fixture or ~3 lines in prompt)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add E2E seed fixture with fix_cycle_count >= 1 for browser verification of fix-cycle amber pills; analyzed in CR-00039 (see ai-dev/active/CR-00039/reports/CR-00039_self_assess_report.md). Effort: M.

findings.title: S02 second fix cycle: design doc TDD section required test update but tests not updated in S01
findings.recommendation: Add a checklist item to the Frontend/Implementation step prompt: 'Confirm that any test file asserting old CSS class names has been updated to reflect the new class names from the design doc TDD section.'
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00039/fix-cycles/CR-00039_S02_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:16 — 'Test at tests/dashboard/test_runtime_override_templates.py:278-284 asserts old CSS class names — must be updated to iw-pipeline-strip/iw-pipeline-pill per CR-00039_CR_Design.md TDD section'
findings.pros: Closes the gap between implementation correctness and test coverage.
findings.if_we_dont: Implementation steps may produce correct code while leaving stale test references, causing code-review fix cycles.
findings.effort: S (~5 lines in implementation step prompt)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add test-update checklist item to Frontend/Implementation step prompt for CRs that change CSS class names; analyzed in CR-00039 (see ai-dev/active/CR-00039/reports/CR-00039_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/CR_Template.md. Effort: S.

notes: No Docker commands attempted, no migrations executed, no prohibited commands used — CLAUDE.md conventions well-surfaced.
S04–S07 (QvGate lint/format/typecheck/unit-tests) all passed on first run with no retries.
3 lower-priority findings omitted from this report.
